name: Shopify
description: Canada's largest technology company. Leading global e-commerce platform powering millions of merchants worldwide. Accenture partnership focuses on cloud migration, AI-powered analytics, merchant experience optimization, and global expansion consulting.

projects.name: Cloud Migration — Phase 3
projects.description: Migration of enterprise merchant services to multi-cloud architecture (AWS + GCP). Includes Kubernetes orchestration and edge computing for global CDN.

projects.name: AI Recommendation Engine
projects.description: Building AI-powered product recommendation engine using transformer models trained on anonymized merchant data. Expected to increase merchant conversion rates by 15-22%.

projects.name: Merchant Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time analytics dashboard for enterprise merchants with predictive inventory management and demand forecasting.

projects.name: Payments Infrastructure Modernization
projects.description: Rebuilding payments processing infrastructure for sub-100ms latency globally. Includes PCI-DSS compliance overhaul and fraud detection AI.

projects.name: Shop Pay International Expansion
projects.description: Regulatory and technical advisory for expanding Shop Pay into 12 new markets across Europe and APAC.

projects.name: Zero Trust Architecture Implementation
projects.description: Enterprise-wide zero trust security architecture. Identity-based access controls, micro-segmentation, and continuous verification across all internal and merchant-facing systems.

projects.name: Threat Intelligence Platform
projects.description: AI-driven threat intelligence platform aggregating signals across merchant ecosystem for proactive fraud and attack prevention.
